n: Instance: A Road Through the Dark

steps.t: You are out for a stroll, but someone appears to be on the road ahead (a bit of an occasion for these quiet parts.) You should speak with the fellow o…
You have encountered a rattled Bounder on the road in the Green Hill Country. You should speak with Bounder Boffin to hear what he has to say.
Bounder Boffin wishes to see if you are capable of wielding a blade to defend yourself. You should practice sparring with Bounder Boffin so that you w…
The spiders are in Odo's Leaf Farm. Bounder Boffin is afraid of spiders, and wishes for you to clear the path before he ventures further down.
Bounder Boffin is waiting for you on the path. You should speak with Bounder Boffin before continuing your escape through the farm.
Bounder Boffin is waiting for you on the path. You should follow Bounder Boffin to escape the menace on the road.
Bounder Boffin is trying to get to safety through Odo's Leaf Farm. You should follow Bounder Boffin to a safer road, which will lead you both to a nea…
Bounder Boffin is trying to get to safety through Odo's Leaf Farm. You should follow Bounder Boffin to a safer road, which will lead you both to a nea…
You are in a jail cell, surrounded by the brigands who kidnapped you and your fellow hobbits.
A mysterious, weather-worn Man is waiting for you in the Brigand jail. You should speak with your rescuer so that he may guide you out of danger.
The door that takes you out of the jail is down the corridor from your jail cell. You should follow Strider out the door of the jail.
Strider now kneels by his grievously wounded friend, Amdir. You should talk to Strider, for he will best know what to do next.
